name: Portly Cheese Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Port-wine cheese (Kraft Spreadery) or Cold-pack port-wine Cheese spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all the ingredients in the order listed.
2. Select white bread and push "Start."
3. A wine-and-cheese-tasting party all by itself, this bread is also wonderful as a snack when spread with additional port-wine cheese.
